title: Paramita Font
description: A compact and refined font with unicode support.
body:
This fontpack adds a tight font.

To install it, make sure to select it in the resource packs screen and put it on top of other font packs.

**This pack supports Latin, Cyrillic, Greek, Armenian and Hebrew scripts.**

**_Pāramitā> perfection_**

# MY OTHER FONTS
